location: Reward for completing the 'Incursion Painting' puzzle: pick up the Incursion Painting at the Artist's Shack southeast of Cliffroad Terminus Site of Grace, then carry it southwest to the ghostly painter seated on a hill facing the natural stone bridge into Belurat, Tower Settlement (east of Belurat, in Gravesite Plain); he vanishes and drops the shield.
tactics: You must be carrying the Incursion Painting item (picked up first at the Artist's Shack) or the ghost won't be visible/interactable.
The ghost sits quietly and can be easy to miss — approach and interact rather than attack.
This is Shadow of the Erdtree DLC content, found in the Land of Shadow's starting region, not the base-game map.
lore: A finely made red shield engraved with a winged serpent, crafted to commemorate the start of Messmer the Impaler's crusade, and prized for its strong fire resistance.

builds.name: Fire-resistant Strength build
builds.why: Highest fire negation among medium shields (63%, higher still with a Fire/Flame Art infusion), strong pick for a Strength turtle vs. fire-heavy DLC enemies.
